title: Bloodmoon's Whisper
description: The rules of the world have been completely overturned. The ancient curse awakens in whispers, and dark creatures crawl out of the shadows
body:
# Bloodmoon's Whisper
## 提示！
**_特殊人群游玩警示_** 
1.  心脏病患者及类似疾病患者：本游戏包含大量恐怖、紧张元素，可能引发心跳加速、血压升高等生理反应，对心脏病患者及其他相关疾病患者存在健康风险。此类人群请勿游玩！
2. 心理疾病患者：游戏中的恐怖氛围、幻觉及惊悚情节可能加重心理负担，影响心理健康。患有焦虑症、抑郁症等心理疾病的玩家请谨慎游玩。
1. 其他特殊人群：对于因游戏内容可能引发不适或健康问题的人群，建议在游玩前咨询专业医生意见。
## 法律声明：
### 本游戏为娱乐产品，旨在提供恐怖主题的沉浸式体验。游玩过程中可能出现的任何不适或健康问题，游戏开发者、整合包作者及相关人员均不承担任何责任。
 >Bloodmoon's Whisper游玩提示
 >- 心理准备
>- 本游戏包含恐怖元素，如黑暗场景、诡异音效、幻觉和怪物攻击。请确保您能够应对这些内容，避免过度紧张或产生不适。
> -合理安排时间
>- 游戏中资源稀缺且生存压力较大，建议合理安排游戏时间，避免长时间沉浸导致疲劳或心理负担过重。
 > 团队合作
>- 支持联网多人模式，与朋友组队可提高生存几率，同时减轻恐怖氛围带来的压力。团队合作是应对血月威胁的关键。
 > -保持警惕
>- 游戏中的危险无处不在，包括伪人、雾中人和幻觉等。请保持冷静，随时注意周围环境。
 > 适度游玩
>- 如果您感到过于恐惧或不适，请立即暂停游戏。游戏旨在提供恐怖体验，但不应影响您的心理健康。
 >- 注意音量
>- 游戏的音效设计具有强烈的恐怖氛围，建议适当调节音量，避免音效对您造成过度惊吓。
 >- 保持理智
>- 游戏中的理智值系统会影响您的视觉和生存状态。请尽量避免长时间处于恐惧状态，合理分配资源以维持理智。
- English version of the description is at the bottom.
###      在《Bloodmoon's Whisper》中，Minecraft 的宁静世界被血月的低语所笼罩，恐怖与未知悄然降临。

- 1.背景：当血月升起，世界的规则被彻底颠覆。古老的诅咒在低语中苏醒，黑暗生物从阴影中爬出，而玩家必须在无尽的恐惧中寻找生存的希望。这片土地上的每一个角落都潜藏着危险，而血月的光辉将带来无尽的恐怖。
- 2.恐怖效果：
1.     伪人：你身边的生物很有可能是伪人所伪造的，~~他们非常危~~...不！一点都不危险！请与他们和谐相处！
2.     雾中人：夜幕降临时，神秘的 “雾中人” 会悄然出现，他会在黑暗中跟踪玩家，带来致命的威胁。
3.     幻觉与诅咒：玩家可能会遭遇幻觉，看到怪物或听到诡异的声音。
4.     恐怖生物（本来有红衣学姐的，但是不允许二次分发，玩家可自行添加）
5.     动态视觉效果：整合包加入了真实的光影效果，黑暗中仅靠火把照亮，增强了探索时的压迫感。
6.     恐怖音效：背景音乐和怪物的低吼声交织在一起，营造出心理恐怖。
7.     理智值系统：玩家的理智值会随着恐惧的增加而下降，当 San 值过低时，画面会扭曲，甚至出现不可见的怪物攻击。
8.     资源稀缺 ：食物和装备变得更加稀缺，玩家必须在黑暗中寻找有限的资源，以维持生存。
- 3.部分生物简介：
  
- > 伪人：你身边的生物很有可能是伪人所伪造的，包括你的朋友...~~他们非常危~~...不！一点都不危险！请与他们和谐相处！
  ![苦力怕-伪人](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b8d2dd4b566df82440ab2865d040ae11806484.png)

  ![伪山羊](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50b0858844e07b3b8b61ef345bd06ee7bbb00d28.png)
  
- > 恐怖怪物一览（**一小部分**）

![部分怪物](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d378ea6afd320698304daabb38197693e6e15b77_0.webp)

>                                          敲门人

English:
 In **Bloodmoon's Whisper**, the tranquil world of Minecraft is enveloped by the whisper of a bloodmoon, with horror and the unknown quietly descending.

- **1\. Background**: When the bloodmoon rises, the rules of the world are completely overturned. Ancient curses awaken in the whispers, dark creatures crawl out from the shadows, and players must search for hope to survive in endless fear. Every corner of this land is filled with danger, and the light of the bloodmoon brings infinite terror.

- **2\. Horror Effects**:
  1. **Impostors**: The creatures around you are highly likely to be forged by impostors, including your friends...**they are very dangerous**... No! Not dangerous at all! Please get along with them harmoniously!
  2. **Man in the Fog**: When night falls, the mysterious "Man in the Fog" will quietly appear. He will stalk the player in the darkness, bringing a deadly threat.
  3. **Hallucinations and Curses**: Players may encounter hallucinations, seeing monsters or hearing eerie sounds.
  4. **Horror Creatures** (There was an upper school sister in red, but secondary distribution is not allowed. Players can add her themselves.)
  5. **Dynamic Visual Effects**: The mod adds realistic lighting effects. In the darkness, only torches can light the way, enhancing the sense of oppression during exploration.
  6. **Horror Sound Effects**: Background music intertwined with monsters' growls creates psychological horror.
  7. **Sanity System**: The player's sanity will decrease as fear increases. When the SAN value is too low, the screen will distort, and even invisible monsters may attack.
  8. **Resource Scarcity**: Food and equipment become scarcer. Players must search for limited resources in the dark to sustain survival.

- **3\. Some Creature Introductions**:

- > **Impostors**: The creatures around you are highly likely to be forged by Impostors, including your friends...**they are very dangerous**... No! Not dangerous at all! Please get along with them harmoniously!
  ![苦力怕-伪人](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b8d2dd4b566df82440ab2865d040ae11806484.png)
  ![羊-伪人](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62f96b6ae9257b7c254f142b9bb3720173385f9d.png)
  ![伪山羊](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50b0858844e07b3b8b61ef345bd06ee7bbb00d28.png)
  
- > **List of Horror Creatures (a small part)**
  [![man from the shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f663963a4bb528c909f9a3b0d3fc1755a276994.jpeg)
  ![him](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447b40e9e5d1635e23d12f99f5b61095aa1ff960.png)
  ![unknown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fad6fab99648a4097b836a79295c0fa49fa0aa2.png)
  ![shy guy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6598aa46a45e9802efb920ca180d86c54351c891.png)
  ![00jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea38caf78b5129a44fd74d8de81e62aafb42b4dd.png)
 ![the s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7315a9ffdfb12198326caa83ed4133aa54d9a5b.png)
  ![the  man for the fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4187c1617185db1bdaf3ae8d512110893b19bd.png)
  ![dushics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a492b0323c433d10f4dfa62aa661cce135a9d247.png)
  ![ko](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753ff0eee285c0c8841c8ecf80ebaea97451c8e6.jpeg)
- > **In - Your - Face Image Display**
  ![sli](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc28c1954fd845edd78516cdd7b52d2998edb75_0.webp)
  ![sil1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9514038a5fce5eb67cd2a149669d3b04604ca8c.png)

  - **Team up with friends**: Together, players can face the threat of the bloodmoon. Cooperation not only increases the chance of survival but also makes the horror adventure more fun.
  - **Stay alert**: Under the bloodmoon, any corner may hide danger.
  - **Allocate resources wisely**: With food and equipment being scarce, **proper planning** is the key to survival.
  - **Teamwork**: Explore with friends and face the unknown horror together.
Tips!

Special groups play warning

Heart disease patients and similar disease patients: This game contains a lot of horror and tension elements, which may cause physiological reactions such as accelerated heartbeat and elevated blood pressure, posing health risks to heart disease patients and other related disease patients. Please do not play for this group of people!
Patients with mental illness: The terrifying atmosphere, hallucinations, and thrilling plot in games may increase psychological burden and affect mental health. Players with psychological disorders such as anxiety and depression are advised to play with caution.
Other special groups: For those who may experience discomfort or health problems due to game content, it is recommended to consult a professional doctor before playing.
Legal Disclaimer:

This game is an entertainment product designed to provide an immersive experience with a horror theme. Any discomfort or health issues that may occur during gameplay are not the responsibility of the game developer, integration package author, or related personnel.
Bloodmoon's Whisper Play Tips

Psychological preparation
This game contains horror elements such as dark scenes, eerie sound effects, illusions, and monster attacks. Please ensure that you are able to handle these contents and avoid excessive tension or discomfort. -Reasonably arrange time
In games, resources are scarce and survival pressure is high. It is recommended to arrange game time reasonably to avoid prolonged immersion leading to fatigue or excessive psychological burden. Teamwork
Supporting multiplayer networking mode, teaming up with friends can increase survival chances while reducing the pressure brought by a terrifying atmosphere. Teamwork is the key to addressing the threat of Blood Moon. -Stay vigilant
The dangers in the game are everywhere, including pseudo humans, foggy people, and illusions. Please remain calm and pay attention to your surroundings at all times. Moderate play
If you feel too scared or uncomfortable, please pause the game immediately. The game aims to provide a terrifying experience, but it should not affect your mental health.
Pay attention to the volume
The sound design of the game has a strong horror atmosphere. It is recommended to adjust the volume appropriately to avoid excessive fright caused by the sound effects.
stay rational 
The rationality value system in the game will affect your visual and survival status. Please try to avoid being in a state of fear for a long time and allocate resources reasonably to maintain rationality.

----Declaration: The following mod was used (link back to mod original post)
